description_long: This object is a compact, modern handgun with a predominantly matte black finish. The frame and slide are angular, with a squared-off profile and minimal external embellishments, giving it a utilitarian appearance. The grip is slightly textured and ergonomically angled, designed for a secure hold, and the trigger guard is robust and squared, providing ample space for finger placement. The barrel is short and flush with the slide, lacking any visible threading or compensator features. There are no visible manufacturer markings, engravings, or decorative elements on the slide or frame, contributing to its minimalist design. The magazine base is flat and seamlessly integrated with the grip, without any flaring or finger extensions.
description: A compact, matte black handgun with a squared, minimalist design and a flat, integrated magazine base. The grip is textured and ergonomic, and the overall appearance is utilitarian and unadorned.
description_view_0: Side view showing the angular frame, ergonomic grip, and squared trigger guard.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the barrel opening and the width of the slide.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the grip and frame details seen in view 0.
description_view_3: Top-down view displaying the flat slide and the alignment of the barrel with the frame.
attribute_grip_design: The grip is slightly angled and features a subtle, stippled texture for enhanced traction. Its contour is ergonomic, fitting comfortably in the hand, with a squared-off base and no visible finger grooves or embellishments. The material appears to be a matte black polymer, and there are no logos or decorative elements present.
attribute_trigger_guard_style: The trigger guard is robust and squared, with a thick profile and ample space for finger placement. It lacks undercuts or integrated accessories, and there is no visible texturing or reinforcement, maintaining a simple, utilitarian design.
attribute_barrel_type: The barrel is short and flush with the front of the slide, with a standard, non-threaded profile. There are no visible ports, compensators, or external markings, and the finish matches the matte black of the slide.
attribute_slide_markings: There are no visible markings, engravings, or inscriptions on the slide. The surface is smooth and unadorned, with no manufacturer logos, model names, or caliber designations apparent.
attribute_magazine_base_shape: The magazine base is flat and seamlessly integrated with the grip, lacking any extension, bevel, or flare. There are no finger rests, logos, or texturing, contributing to the minimalist appearance.
